description.value: You grab hold of your foe with your powerful primary limbs, temporarily distracting them. If you critically succeed your check to [[/act grapple]] an enemy, you can attempt to [[/act steal]] something from the enemy as a free action. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Thievery check to Steal, as your grapple makes it difficult for your foe to keep track of your vestigial arms. You can Steal any immediately accessible item of light Bulk or less on the enemy's person, such as a holstered weapon or a serum hanging from a belt, but not anything inside a container or anything the enemy is holding. The GM makes the final determination on what you can Steal in this way.
